subject: Audit and canonicalize CSD EDA script
description: Verify which EDA scripts exist in thesis/data/preprocessing/nielsen/CSD/. Currently confirmed: pre_csd_1.5_eda.py and pre_csd_1.5_eda.ipynb. The 2026-05-14 consolidation plan called for renaming the _expanded variant to pre_csd_eda.py and deleting the superseded scripts. Check what files actually exist (glob), determine which is the canonical/most complete version, rename it to pre_csd_1.5_eda.py (or confirm current name is final), delete any superseded duplicates. Verify the log_necessary NameError bug fix (add `log_necessary = None` before the statsmodels block) is already applied. Verify by running: python pre_csd_1.5_eda.py --help or a dry import check. Output: single canonical EDA script with no duplicates.
